error.401.title: Authentication Required
error.401.subtitle: This service area requires an authenticated session.
error.401.message: Authentication is required. Open /service/login to continue.
error.403.title: Access Denied
error.403.subtitle: This service area is disabled or unavailable in this deployment.
error.403.message: Access to this service area is denied in the current deployment.
error.404.title: Page Unavailable
error.404.subtitle: The requested operating view is not present in this deployment.
error.404.message: The requested page is not available. Return to a listed operating view and continue from there.
error.500.title: View Temporarily Unavailable
error.500.subtitle: The requested operating view could not be rendered at this time.
error.500.message: The page could not be loaded. Retry the operation or return to another view.

alarm.none_matching: No alarms match the current filter selection.
trends.context.stable_live_history: Current generation values remain stable across the selected history window.
trends.context.live_history_visible: The trace shows recent live movement across output and generation.
trends.context.curtailment_visible: The live trace shows curtailed output across the recent history window.
trends.context.breaker_open: The trace ends with an isolated export path caused by an open breaker.
trends.context.comms_degraded: Trend confidence is reduced because communications are degraded.
service.login_hint: Service access is limited to the documented V1 control paths. No logout link is exposed in this deployment.
service.login_failed: Authentication failed. Check credentials and retry.
service.power_limit_hint: Adjust the PPC limit in 0.1 % steps. The visible plant output will follow the same shared-truth path as Modbus.
service.reactive_power_hint: Adjust the PPC reactive power target in 0.1 % steps between -100 % and +100 %. The same shared-truth path as Unit 1 FC16 is used.
service.plant_mode_hint: Plant mode requests are latched on Unit 1. The visible operating mode only changes when the process model follows the request.
service.breaker_hint: Breaker requests use the same shared-truth path as Unit 41. Open isolates export; close restores the normal export path.
service.inverter_block_hint: Block enable and limit requests use the same shared-truth path as Units 11-13. Reset is a self-clearing pulse and is mainly visible when recovering a communication loss.
service.status.control_invalid: Submitted control request was invalid. Review the value and retry.
service.status.control_rejected: Submitted control request was rejected by the local process model.
service.status.control_unavailable: Service control path is not available in this runtime slice.
service.action.power_limit: Active power limit can be adjusted from this panel.
service.action.reactive_power: Reactive power target can be adjusted from this panel.
service.action.plant_mode: Plant mode requests can be latched from this panel.
service.action.breaker: Breaker open and close requests can be issued from this panel.
service.action.block_control: Inverter block enable and block power limits can be changed from this panel.
service.action.block_reset: Inverter block reset pulses can be issued from this panel.
weather.context.strong_output_supported: High irradiance supports the current plant output.
weather.context.low_irradiance_explains_: Reduced irradiance explains the current plant output.
weather.context.curtailment_limits_outpu: Current plant output is limited by the active power cap.
weather.context.reduced_confidence: Weather confidence is reduced; compare output with care.
weather.context.review_alignment: Review plant output against the current weather context.
meter.context.normal_export: Export path is available and meter readings support normal export.
meter.context.breaker_open_blocks_export: Breaker open blocks export at the grid handoff.
meter.context.export_path_unavailable: Grid path is unavailable; export readings should stay constrained.
meter.context.reduced_confidence: Meter confidence is reduced; compare export readings with care.
meter.context.review_alignment: Review export readings against the current grid context.
